prestazioni: Engine swap to a VQ35DE (3.5L V6, 280hp stock) with a Tomei 272° duration camshaft kit, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) for a target of 450whp on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing boost via an HKS EVC6 electronic boost controller

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Nismo 4.375 final drive ratio R200 differential, Cusco 1.5-way LSD, and a PPG sequential gearbox with straight-cut gears (1st: 2.583, 2nd: 1.985, 3rd: 1.533) paired with a Tilton twin-plate ceramic clutch and lightweight flywheel

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8-way adjustable damping), Cusco front strut tower bar, Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm), and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for the front lower control arms and rear subframe
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and bumper extensions) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to clear 285/30R19 tires on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (9.5J front, 10.5J rear, +25 offset)

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem) with integrated canards and a carbon fiber GT wing (900mm chord, 150mm height) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals for adjustable angle

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (red Alcantara), Takata 4-point harnesses, a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel, and a custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded mild steel) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
